results.title: Musk Pledges $100 Million to 'Historically Accurate' Version of 'The Odyssey' with Mel Gibson as Director
results.description: Elon Musk says Grok will get “The Odyssey” right. “Before this year ends, Grok Imagine will make a full-length movie of The Odyssey that is historically accurate and true to [...] The post Musk Pledges $100 Million to 'Historically Accurate' Version of 'The Odyssey' with Mel Gibson as Director appeared first on The Western Journal .
